_comment: Consolidated + DEDUPED private/independent schools, merged across all ingested sources (AISF, NCES PSS, ...) by ingest_sources.py. Keyed by NCES PSS id, else normalized name; 'sources' lists every directory an entry was seen in. Public, no PII.
